description_short: Soft, breathable, and effortlessly light, our 120 GSM Virgin Microfiber Comforter is made for everyday comfort. Designed as a dual-colour summer AC comforter.

construction_layers.name: Fill
construction_layers.notes: Lightweight for warm weather / AC rooms.

cover_fabric.wash_instructions: Machine washable. Single fits 5-7kg machine, Double fits 8-10kg machine.

faq_specs.question: Can I use this comforter in AC rooms during summer?
faq_specs.answer: Absolutely, it's ideal for AC environments where light layering is needed. It provides just the right amount of coziness without overheating.

notes_observed: Comforter ladder by GSM: Summer 120 → All-Season 200 → Winter 400. Same dual-color reversible cover style across all three.
